title: Quick Guide - Osprey/Tern - Custom Swipe animation screen
scenario: Verify Custom Swipe animation and Replay functionality on the 2nd screen of Quick Guide when tapping the right blue circle on Osprey/Tern devices.
steps: Launch the app with the device connected.
Navigate to the 2nd screen (showing two earbuds).
Tap the right blue circle to trigger zoom and Custom Swipe animation.
Wait for the animation to end and verify that the 'Replay' button appears.
Test the replay functionality by tapping the 'Replay' button.
Tap or swipe during animation playback to check behavior.
Tap the blue circle again to zoom out.
expected: The Custom Swipe animation plays correctly, the "Replay" button appears after the animation ends, replay works, interactions during playback are handled properly, and tapping the blue circle again zooms out successfully.
